creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Anton Saietskii from comment #5)

Hi,

I found some time to hack the patch again, and removed the unconditional dependencies I added.

I am patching the autoconfigure files with REIMPLACE_CMD to make the build skip completely doc parts even for autoreconf.

Can you test it before the end of the year? I plan to commit this before the next quarterly is branched.

Thanks in advance.
